understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to solve puzzle levels by maneuvering one or more selectable pieces (P/S) to push blocks (B) onto goal positions (+) within a limited number of steps, progressing through multiple levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) in the chosen direction by 3 pixels (one cell), potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects like blocks if unobstructed; walls (#) block movement variably. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at the exact target_position coordinates, allowing multi-piece control.
